name: Drive Hills
description: The game Drive Hills is an excellent 3D car driving game, drive your car and bring an egg to travel around the world. But there will be some obstacles on your road, you need to overcome the difficulties to reach the next city. Don't forget to collect coins to unlock new cars and eggs. Don't miss the Drive Hills!
instructions: Mouse click or tap the screen to play
tags: Balance, Boy, Boys, Car, Driving, H5, HTML, HTML5, Kids, Obstacle, Platform, Skills, Stickman
